## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of the problem.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

A minimal example repository is hugely appreciated when the bug depends on the
shape of the indexed project.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include logs / stack traces inside triple backticks.

```
<paste output here>
```

## Environment

- Belisarius version (`belisarius --version`):
- OS and arch:
- Rust toolchain (`rustc --version`):
- Indexed project language(s):

## Additional context

Anything else that might help us reproduce or fix this.
